models.name: Gemini 3.6 Flash
models.note_en: Workhorse efficiency model with better coding, knowledge work and ~17% lower output-token usage than 3.5 Flash.
models.note_zh: 效率主力模型，程式碼與知識工作表現提升，輸出token用量較3.5 Flash約降17%。

models.name: Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite
models.note_en: Fastest 3.5-class model (350 tok/s) optimized for high-volume agentic and coding tasks.
models.note_zh: 3.5系列最快模型（350 tok/s），針對高量代理與程式碼任務優化。

models.name: Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber
models.note_en: Lightweight cybersecurity specialist fine-tuned for vulnerability finding, validation and patching; limited pilot access.
models.note_zh: 輕量網路安全專用模型，微調用於漏洞發現、驗證與修補；限量試點存取。

models.name: Cosmos 3 Edge
models.note_en: 4B-parameter open omnimodel for edge physical AI; understands/generates text, image, video, sound and action; #1 on VANTAGE-Bench.
models.note_zh: 40億參數開源全模態模型，專為邊緣實體AI設計；能理解與生成文字、影像、影片、聲音與動作；VANTAGE-Bench排名第一。

models.name: NVIDIA Cosmos 3 Edge
models.note_en: 4B-parameter open omnimodel for edge devices; understands/generates text, image, video, sound and action; #1 on VANTAGE-Bench in class.
models.note_zh: 40 億參數開源全模態模型，專為邊緣裝置優化；可理解與生成文字、影像、影片、聲音與動作；同參數級 VANTAGE-Bench 排名第一。

models.name: Inkling
models.note_en: First open-weights model from Thinking Machines Lab: 975B MoE (41B active), native multimodal (text/image/audio), up to 1M context, fine-tunable on Tinker.
models.note_zh: Thinking Machines Lab首款開源權重模型：975B MoE（活躍41B）、原生多模態（文字／圖像／音訊）、最高1M上下文，可在Tinker上微調。

models.name: Inkling
models.note_en: 975B total / 41B active parameters MoE multimodal model (text/image/audio) with 1M context window; first open-weights release from Thinking Machines Lab under Apache 2.0.
models.note_zh: 975B 總參數 / 41B 活躍參數 MoE 多模態模型（文字/圖像/音訊），具 100 萬 token 上下文；Thinking Machines Lab 首個 Apache 2.0 開放權重發布。

models.name: GPT-5.6 Sol
models.note_en: OpenAI's flagship agentic model for coding, professional work, and long-running execution.
models.note_zh: OpenAI 旗艦代理模型，強化程式開發、專業工作與長時間執行。

models.name: Grok 4.5
models.note_en: SpaceXAI's model for coding, agentic tasks, and knowledge work.
models.note_zh: SpaceXAI 面向程式開發、代理任務與知識工作的模型。

models.name: Claude Sonnet 5
models.note_en: Anthropic's most agentic Sonnet model, improving reasoning, tools, coding, and knowledge work.
models.note_zh: Anthropic 代理能力最強的 Sonnet，提升推理、工具使用、程式與知識工作。

models.name: Claude Opus 4.8
models.note_en: An Opus upgrade with stronger judgment, collaboration, coding, and agentic reliability.
models.note_zh: Opus 升級版，強化判斷、協作、程式開發與代理可靠性。

models.name: Gemini 3.5 Flash
models.note_en: Google's fast Gemini 3.5 model for coding and complex long-horizon agentic workflows.
models.note_zh: Google Gemini 3.5 快速模型，面向程式與複雜長時代理工作流。

models.name: GPT-5.5
models.note_en: OpenAI's model for agentic coding, knowledge work, computer use, and scientific research.
models.note_zh: OpenAI 面向代理程式開發、知識工作、電腦操作與科學研究的模型。

models.name: Claude Opus 4.7
models.note_en: An Opus upgrade for difficult software engineering, long-running agents, vision, and professional work.
models.note_zh: Opus 升級版，強化高難度軟體工程、長時代理、視覺與專業工作。

models.name: GPT-5.4
models.note_en: OpenAI's general-purpose model with native computer use and a one-million-token context window.
models.note_zh: OpenAI 原生支援電腦操作、具百萬 token 上下文的一般用途模型。

models.name: Gemini 3.1 Pro
models.note_en: Google's upgraded Gemini 3 core model for advanced reasoning and complex problem-solving.
models.note_zh: Google Gemini 3 核心升級版，面向進階推理與複雜問題求解。

models.name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
models.note_en: A broad Sonnet upgrade across coding, computer use, long-context reasoning, planning, and design.
models.note_zh: Sonnet 全面升級，涵蓋程式、電腦操作、長上下文推理、規劃與設計。

models.name: GPT-5.3-Codex
models.note_en: OpenAI's agentic coding model combining coding, reasoning, and professional knowledge.
models.note_zh: OpenAI 代理程式模型，整合程式能力、推理與專業知識。

models.name: Claude Opus 4.6
models.note_en: An Opus upgrade for careful planning, sustained agents, large codebases, review, and debugging.
models.note_zh: Opus 升級版，強化縝密規劃、長時代理、大型程式庫、審查與除錯。

models.name: GPT-5.2
models.note_en: A GPT-5 upgrade for professional knowledge work, long-running agents, tools, and vision.
models.note_zh: GPT-5 升級版，強化專業知識工作、長時代理、工具使用與視覺。

models.name: DeepSeek-V3.2 / V3.2-Speciale
models.note_en: Reasoning-first open models with thinking in tool use and a high-compute Speciale variant.
models.note_zh: 推理優先的開放模型，支援工具使用中思考，另有高運算 Speciale 版本。

models.name: Claude Opus 4.5
models.note_en: An Opus upgrade for coding, agents, computer use, research, slides, and spreadsheets.
models.note_zh: Opus 升級版，強化程式、代理、電腦操作、研究、簡報與試算表。

models.name: Grok 4.1 Fast
models.note_en: xAI's fast tool-calling model with a two-million-token context window.
models.note_zh: xAI 快速工具呼叫模型，具兩百萬 token 上下文。

models.name: Gemini 3 Pro
models.note_en: Google's Gemini 3 flagship for reasoning, multimodal understanding, coding, and agentic workflows.
models.note_zh: Google Gemini 3 旗艦模型，強化推理、多模態、程式與代理工作流。

models.name: Grok 4.1
models.note_en: A Grok 4 update focused on creative, emotional, collaborative, and factual interactions.
models.note_zh: Grok 4 升級版，著重創意、情感、協作與事實可靠性。

models.name: GPT-5.1
models.note_en: A GPT-5 upgrade with improved conversational style, instruction following, and adaptive reasoning.
models.note_zh: GPT-5 升級版，改善對話風格、指令遵循與自適應推理。

models.name: Claude Haiku 4.5
models.note_en: Anthropic's fast, economical Claude 4.5 model for coding and high-volume agent use.
models.note_zh: Anthropic 快速經濟的 Claude 4.5 模型，面向程式與大量代理任務。

models.name: Claude Sonnet 4.5
models.note_en: A Sonnet upgrade for coding, complex agents, computer use, reasoning, and mathematics.
models.note_zh: Sonnet 升級版，強化程式、複雜代理、電腦操作、推理與數學。

models.name: DeepSeek-V3.1
models.note_en: A hybrid open model with thinking and non-thinking modes plus stronger agent skills.
models.note_zh: 開放混合模型，整合思考與非思考模式並強化代理能力。

models.name: GPT-5
models.note_en: OpenAI's unified flagship system with built-in thinking and stronger coding, reasoning, and tools.
models.note_zh: OpenAI 統一旗艦系統，內建思考並提升程式、推理與工具使用。

models.name: Claude Opus 4.1
models.note_en: An Opus 4 upgrade focused on agents, real-world coding, reasoning, and detail tracking.
models.note_zh: Opus 4 升級版，著重代理、真實程式開發、推理與細節追蹤。

models.name: Grok 4 / Grok 4 Heavy
models.note_en: xAI's frontier reasoning models with native tools and real-time search integration.
models.note_zh: xAI 前沿推理模型，原生整合工具與即時搜尋。

models.name: Claude Opus 4
models.note_en: Anthropic's Claude 4 flagship for advanced reasoning, coding, and long-running agents.
models.note_zh: Anthropic Claude 4 旗艦模型，面向進階推理、程式與長時代理。

models.name: Claude Sonnet 4
models.note_en: Anthropic's balanced Claude 4 model for coding, reasoning, and agent workflows.
models.note_zh: Anthropic Claude 4 均衡模型，面向程式、推理與代理工作流。

models.name: OpenAI o3 / o4-mini
models.note_en: Reasoning models that can combine ChatGPT tools and reason over visual inputs.
models.note_zh: 可組合 ChatGPT 工具並針對視覺輸入推理的模型。

models.name: Llama 4 Scout / Maverick
models.note_en: Meta's open-weight, natively multimodal mixture-of-experts Llama 4 models.
models.note_zh: Meta Llama 4 開放權重、原生多模態混合專家模型。

models.name: DeepSeek-V3-0324
models.note_en: A V3 open-weight update with stronger reasoning, front-end coding, and tool use.
models.note_zh: V3 開放權重升級版，強化推理、前端程式與工具使用。

models.name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
models.note_en: Google's thinking model for complex reasoning, coding, mathematics, and science.
models.note_zh: Google 思考型模型，面向複雜推理、程式、數學與科學。

models.name: Grok 3 Beta
models.note_en: xAI's preview combining larger-scale pretraining with reinforced reasoning.
models.note_zh: xAI 預覽模型，結合更大規模預訓練與強化推理。

models.name: DeepSeek-R1
models.note_en: DeepSeek's open reasoning model released with weights and technical documentation.
models.note_zh: DeepSeek 開放推理模型，同步釋出權重與技術資料。
